news.text: FedEx launches same-day delivery with OneRail as Amazon, Walmart boost their speeds
Iran arrests 466 people accused of online activity undermining national security, IRNA says - Reuters
Trump wants a deal with Iran but success of talks unlikely, Israeli officials say - Reuters
Foreign outflows hit Asian stocks as Iran war drives oil shock fears - Reuters
Iran war fuel crisis gives electric cars a long-term boost - Reuters
Iran war deals harder blow to natural gas than oil - Reuters

brief:
◆ Market Overview

Futures are green across the board with small caps leading the charge (IWM +2.16%), while VIX drops 4.56% to 34.33 suggesting some risk appetite is returning. The Iran war premium is keeping volatility elevated, but US equities are holding up better than global peers as money flows home.

◆ What to Watch

  • Geopolitical Headlines: Iran tensions continue driving market sentiment - any escalation/de-escalation news will move markets instantly
  • Energy Complex: Oil shock fears creating winners and losers - watch XLE, renewable plays, and transportation stocks
  • FedEx News: Same-day delivery launch with OneRail could pressure Amazon's logistics dominance
  • Foreign Flows: Asian outflows accelerating into US markets - dollar strength likely to continue
⚡ Key Driver
Iran war fears are reshaping energy markets - natural gas hit harder than oil, renewables getting a demand boost, electric vehicle adoption accelerating on fuel crisis concerns.

◆ Sector Rotation

Consumer Discretionary leading pre-market (+2.21%) as investors bet on resilient US consumer despite geopolitical chaos. Healthcare lagging (-0.39%) along with defensive staples as risk-on sentiment builds. Energy modest gains (+0.54%) despite oil shock narrative - market may be pricing in peak fear.
✦ Bull Case
US equity resilience vs global peers shows capital flight to safety. VIX dropping suggests fear peak may be behind us. Small caps outperforming signals domestic focus.
⚠ Bear Case
VIX still above 34 - one headline away from risk-off. Asian outflows accelerating could reverse quickly. Iran situation far from resolved with 466 arrests overnight.

◆ Levels That Matter

  • SPY: $655 pre-market high is resistance - need to hold $650 on any pullback
  • VIX: Below 32 would signal real fear subsiding, above 38 means trouble
  • IWM: $250 is psychological resistance for small caps - momentum trade if it breaks
  • XLE: Energy sector needs to reclaim $95 to validate oil shock narrative

Not a prediction. A preparation. Make your plan before the bell.
